name: Item Sorter
description: Build an item sorter that separates items by type. Use comparators to detect item types in a hopper, and pistons to push matching items into separate collection hoppers. Sort at least 3 different item types (e.g., diamonds, iron, gold).
hints: Comparator outputs signal strength based on first item stack type and size
Place filter item in hopper above comparator to detect matching items
Use comparator in subtract mode to check for exact matches
Pistons push items from main line to collection hoppers
Cascade multiple sorters for multiple item types

verification.initial_state: All hoppers empty except filter hoppers
verification.action: Place mixed items in input hopper
verification.expected_result: Items should be sorted into correct output hoppers by type
